General.Name: SOLAI Limited
General.Description: SOLAI Limited operates as a technology-driven crypto currency infrastructure company. It is involved in the crypto mining activities; building a blockchain-based ecosystem covering AI, stablecoins, and payment infrastructure; and Solana treasury and staking operations. The company was formerly known as BIT Mining Limited and changed its name to SOLAI Limited in October 2025. SOLAI Limited was founded in 2001 and is based in Akron, Ohio.
General.Address: 428 South Seiberling Street, Akron, OH, United States, 44306
